name: Burns
description: Section chief of Berlint City Hall, overseeing the work of [Yor Forger](https://anilist.co/character/138102/Yor-Forger), [Camilla](https://anilist.co/character/180191/Camilla), [Millie](https://anilist.co/character/270958/Millie), and [Sharon](https://anilist.co/character/270959/Sharon).
